t_ch: 自始至终，恐怕从未有过寰宇蝗灾的「死灭之蛹」吧？
t_en: I suspect there was never any Chrysalis of Extinction from the Swarm Disaster to begin with, was there?

t_ch: 存在于橡木公馆的不过是伪装——<color=#dbc291ff>藏于其中的，只有星核。</color>
t_en: What exists in Oak Manor is nothing but a disguise. <color=#dbc291ff>The only thing hidden within is a Stellaron.</color>

t_ch: 不错，我从未堪破「繁育」之秘，如今一分为四，一击之力，也无法奈何那猎手。
t_en: True, I never unraveled the secrets of the Propagation. Now split into four parts, a single strike of mine cannot harm that Hunter.

t_ch: 可一位与虫群同源的行者，若是被调律骗过，误以为眼前确为死地，在星核面前许下「想要活着」的愿望，那结果，便将扭曲成致人以死的灾祸，寰宇蝗灾。
t_en: But if a pathstrider of the same origin as the Swarm were to be deceived by tuning, mistaking what lies before them as certain death... If they were to make a wish "to live" before the Stellaron... The outcome would twist into a catastrophe that brings death: the Swarm Disaster.

t_ch: 以她的「向生而死」，予此世「向死而生」——但您为何如此确信，此事绝无错失？
t_en: Her life shall "beget death," and that death shall "beget life" unto this world. But why are you so certain that nothing will go wrong?

t_ch: 我早已窥得星核之秘，无需确信任何事。若她从未入局，那一击仍会适时降下，令星核就此爆裂。
t_en: I've already glimpsed the secrets of the Stellaron, and I have no need for certainty here. Even if she never entered the game, that strike would still fall at the appointed time, causing the Stellaron to shatter.

t_ch: 入梦者都将知晓，杀死自己的力量源于「同谐」——但那终究只是下策。
t_en: The dreamers will learn that the power to destroy their own lives comes from the Harmony, but that it is ultimately the worst option.

t_ch: 您该知道，我不会认同。
t_en: You should know that I won't agree with this.

t_ch: 为时已晚，孩子。指针已然落于子夜，抬起头来，目视群星——知道它们因何而残忍吗？
t_en: Too late, child. The hands of time have struck midnight. Look up at the stars. Do you know why they are so cruel?

t_ch: 其原因，将是最后一道「律令」，以此，我等将一切交于你手——
t_en: That reason shall be the final "divine law." And with this, we entrust everything into your hands...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>00</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█因众星属于所有人，也便从未属于任何人。若你爱着所有人，便是不爱任何人。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>00</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█Because the stars belong to everyone, they have never belonged to anyone. If you love everyone, then you love no one."</color>

t_ch: 我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
t_en: Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...

t_ch: 开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
t_en: The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.

t_ch: 「秩序」的道路，我将如您所愿，行至尽头。但您的律令，我已不能认同。若我成为了天空中{RUBY_B#无缺骄阳}唯一的星{RUBY_E#}，即便从不属于任何人，也绝无残忍可言。
t_en: I shall walk the path of the Order to its end, as you wish. But I can no longer accept your divine laws. If I become {RUBY_B#the flawless sun}the only star{RUBY_E#} in the sky, even if I belonged to no one, there would still be no cruelty.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>众星残忍，只因他们从未将热力分予万众，只为自身熊熊燃烧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The stars are cruel, only because they have never shared their heat with the masses, burning fiercely only for themselves.</color>

t_ch: 天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
t_en: Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.

t_ch: 又岂会容许众星，于白昼之中放光？
t_en: Moreover, how could I allow other stars to shine during the day?

t_ch: 乐园终将造就，不在子夜，而在「正午」。神主日最初，也是唯一的律令，由我亲启——
t_en: Paradise shall soon be created, not at midnight, but at "noon." I shall initiate the first and only divine law of the Great Septimus...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>12</unbreak>：<unbreak>00</unbreak>█我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>12</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>█I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun. Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."</color>

t_ch: 也好，孩子…放手而为吧。或许，我也并非选无可选，而是耽于趋利避害，从未知其不可，亦要为之。
t_en: Very well, child... do what you must. Perhaps I was never without choice, merely too entangled with the fear of losing, never knowing what was possible if I chose to act.

t_ch: 我应当也去做个「钟表匠」，我所认定的谐乐，仅有一个音节周而复始，永不失准——
t_en: I should become a Watchmaker too. The harmony I seek has but one note repeating endlessly, never falling out of tune...

t_ch: （指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
t_en: Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...

t_ch: 生亦有时。
t_en: Life, too, has its time.

t_ch: 成功了，是他先一步消散，让那道力量失去了控制。
t_en: We did it... He faded first, causing that power to lose control.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: 命运合上了它的先兆，应时而来。
t_en: Fate closed its premonitions, and arrived in due time.

t_ch: 你…怎么…
t_en: How... did you...

t_ch: （指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
t_en: Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...

t_ch: 死亦有时。
t_en: Death comes for us all eventually.

t_ch: 这是什么地方？
t_en: What is this place?

t_ch: 橡木公馆，曾是朝露公馆的一部分。成为「梦主」前，他常常在此举行家系议会，但如今已废弃多年，沉入了原始忆域。
t_en: Oak Manor, once part of the Dewlight Pavilion. Before becoming the Dreammaster, he used to hold family councils here, but it's been abandoned for years now, sinking into the Primordial Memory Zone.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: 恐怕，是苦痛。
t_en: I'm afraid it's... pain.

t_ch: 在你看来，梦主会选择哪边？
t_en: In your opinion, which path would the Dreammaster choose?

t_ch: 或是「强权」之路吧。但流萤小姐不妨自便，今日我不作他想。
t_en: Probably the path of "force." But Miss Firefly, feel free to do as you please. I have no other thoughts today.

t_ch: 未走之路，不可追回。即便身处梦中，此事亦然啊……
t_en: The road not taken can never be retraced. Even in dreams, this truth remains...

t_ch: 看来，也只是殊途同归，人的意志，作用当真微乎其微。
t_en: In the end, all paths lead to the same destination. Human will, it seems, truly has very little impact.

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 纳努克亲自示现，无限夫长因之陨落…此事震动寰宇，我早已知晓。又何必劳烦一位「主家」使者亲赴边陲？
t_en: The manifestation of Nanook and the fall of the Eternal Centurion... Such news has shaken the universe, and I've long since known about it. So why would a messenger of the Main Family take the trouble to visit this frontier?

t_ch: 只是顺便一提，我为降罚而来——其罪在你。
t_en: Just so you know, I'm here to deliver punishment, and you're the guilty one.

t_ch: 此前我险些死去，至今无法示以原身，为何重回此地后，会平白获罪？
t_en: I barely escaped death, and I still can't reveal my true form. Tell me, why have I been branded a criminal upon returning to this place?

t_ch: 你已自行坦白了罪状。
t_en: You've already confessed to your crimes.

t_ch: 即便只是边陲之地的分家领袖，家族也不会容忍他的无能，非但无法弹压局势，甚至遭人杀害——若非纳努克示现，「无限夫长」本将降于匹诺康尼，荡绝恶徒。
t_en: The Family doesn't tolerate incompetence, even from a branch leader on the frontier. Not only did this one fail to quell the situation, he was even murdered. If it weren't for Nanook's manifestation, the Eternal Centurion would have descended upon Penacony to eliminate these villains.

t_ch: 但你侥幸生还，我也因之启程。你须亲自平定此事，将丢却的敬畏取回——不是之于你，而是之于家族。
t_en: But you survived by sheer luck, and I set out for this very reason. You must settle this matter yourself and reclaim your lost respect... not for yourself, but for The Family.

t_ch: …仓促得生，力不能逮。
t_en: ...To survive, but without the power to do anything.

t_ch: 因此，你的罪行，将以「恩赐」来责罚——
t_en: Therefore, your crime shall be punished with a "blessing"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>赐予你另一桩罪行。其恶弥天，一旦知晓，歌斐木这名字便要失去意义，你将虽生犹死</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I shall bestow upon you another crime. Its evil reaches even the heavens, and once known, the name Gopher Wood will lose all meaning. You will be alive in body but dead in spirit.</color>

t_ch: 我知我罪，敬请降罚。
t_en: I know my sins. Please bestow your punishment.

t_ch: 此时此地？这可无从施予。在引你前往那处蜜泉之前，我将为你进行调律，使你无法再作声张。
t_en: Here and now? That's not possible. Before I lead you to that honeyed fountain, I shall tune you so that you can no longer speak out.

t_ch: 世人皆以为，那是「毁灭」的造物，因其常与灾异同行同至。
t_en: People believe it to be a creation of the Destruction, for it always arrives coupled with calamity.

t_ch: 我将拨开你眼前的阴翳，使你再度直视那予取予求的伟力，敬拜三重面相降下的仁慈——
t_en: I shall clear the shadows before your eyes, so that you may once again behold that almighty force that giveth and taketh, and worship the mercy bestowed by the Triple Face...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「{RUBY_B#希佩}同谐{RUBY_E#}之癌」，星核。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The {RUBY_B#Xipe's}Harmonic{RUBY_E#} Cancer, the Stellaron.</color>

t_ch: 「梦主」在那时就已经知道，星核其实是「同谐」命途的造物吗…而且，是遵从家族的命令，才被迫操纵星核？
t_en: Did the Dreammaster already know back then that the Stellaron was actually a creation of the Path of Harmony... Was he forced to manipulate the Stellaron under The Family's orders?

t_ch: 我倒也想为其辩解，但说是被迫，未免自欺欺人……
t_en: I'd like to defend him, but calling it "forced" would be self-deception...

t_ch: 他说自己「力有不逮」，而非「希佩教导我等不应如此」。无论家族是何面目，此刻的歌斐木，也早已不是「同谐」的信者。
t_en: He claimed he was "powerless," not that "Xipe taught us we shouldn't do this." Whatever The Family's true face may be, right now, Gopher Wood is no longer a follower of the Harmony.

t_ch: 如果站在那里的，是你呢？
t_en: What if you were the one standing there?

t_ch: 或许也会背弃「同谐」吧。但无论如何，那只是认定家族不值得服从，无法为梦主将行的大恶辩护。
t_en: Perhaps I too would betray the Harmony. But in any case, that would only mean I found The Family unworthy of obedience. It doesn't justify the Dreammaster's heinous acts.

t_ch: …流萤小姐，您曾思索过命运吗？
t_en: ...Miss Firefly, have you ever pondered over destiny?

t_ch: 我常在想，若我们能重新面对过去的抉择，是否真会作出不同的决定？
t_en: I often wonder, if we could face our past decisions again, would we really make different choices?

t_ch: 在那人偶手上，流萤女士。
t_en: It's in that puppet's hand, Lady Firefly.

t_ch: 众星因何残忍
t_en: Why are the stars so cruel?

t_ch: 拿到了。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 乐园我已然成就
t_en: Paradise have I wrought,

t_ch: 可人们无法认出
t_en: Yet men discern it not.

t_ch: 于最美好的地方
t_en: In the fairest place,

t_ch: 他们寻求痛苦
t_en: They seek for sorrow,

t_ch: 只因认定
t_en: For they deem

t_ch: 无人配得上幸福
t_en: None worthy of felicity.

t_ch: 便教「繁育」再度投下天火，示以「死亡」的哀鸣。
t_en: Let the Propagation rain down heavenly fire once more, heralding the mournful cry of "death."

t_ch: 便教「同谐」之谎顷刻败露，示以「真实」的尖刀。
t_en: Let the Harmony's lies be exposed in an instant, revealed by the piercing blade of "truth."

t_ch: 便教回首千次，来路亦已不复，唯余「徒然」的悲叹。
t_en: Even if you look back a thousand times, the path you've taken can't be retraced, leaving only sighs of "futility."

t_ch: 似曾相识…我似乎嗅到了此处的「不甘」啊。
t_en: Déjà vu... I can smell the "resentment" lingering in this place.

t_ch: 好了，我们就此行向殊途。你获生，我赴死——何者为佳，唯有神明知晓。
t_en: Well then, our paths diverge here. You go towards life, and I towards death. Which path is better, only the gods know.

t_ch: 这个数量…难道歌斐木的计划，已经开始实现了？
t_en: So many... Could Gopher Wood's plan already be in motion?

t_ch: 不可能……
t_en: No... Impossible...

t_ch: 好破败的景象……
t_en: What a desolate sight...

t_ch: 倘若自愿沉沦
t_en: If you willfully sink to ruin

t_ch: 又为何苛求真实
t_en: Why press so hard for the truth

t_ch: 这里的样子…必须抓紧时间了。
t_en: This place already looks... We need to hurry.

t_ch: 看不出异常之处，难道我选错了吗？
t_en: Nothing seems out of place... Did I pick the wrong one?

t_ch: 若我选无可选
t_en: If I were to have no choice

t_ch: 你也绝非例外
t_en: Nor shall you

t_ch: 向死而生？
t_en: From death, comes life?

t_ch: 滴答……
t_en: Tick-tock...

t_ch: 我有些痛恨自己的无能了，此刻，我多希望自己能有办法，使你感到宽慰。别着急，一切早已过去。
t_en: I'm starting to hate how powerless I am. How I wish that I had some way to comfort you right at this moment. Don't worry. That was all in the past.

t_ch: 流萤怎么样了？
t_en: What happened to Firefly?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>濒临死地，但仍然幸存。</color>她的第二次死亡还未到来，却又近在眼前。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She had almost reached her demise, yet she survived.</color> Her second death hadn't come yet. It would be upon her soon.

t_ch: 梦主干了什么？
t_en: What did the Dreammaster do?

t_ch: 谋划多年，他将一位格拉默铁骑，引诱到了星核面前。自入梦起，虽然流萤调查到的都是真相，却都是梦主想要让她看到的真相。
t_en: He lured a Glamoth Iron Cavalry to face a Stellaron after years of plotting. Though everything Firefly had learned since entering the dream was true, they were only truths that the Dreammaster wanted her to see.

t_ch: 而这，往往被称作最高等的谎言。
t_en: And that... is often regarded as the highest form of deception.

t_ch: 星核回应了流萤想要活下去的祈祷，于美梦中，再造了寰宇蝗灾，以及…星神「太一」。
t_en: The Stellaron answered Firefly's desire to keep living. In response, it recreated within the sweet dream the Swarm Disaster... and the Aeon Ena.

t_ch: …寰宇蝗灾？
t_en: ...The Swarm Disaster?

t_ch: 只局限于梦中，即便星核也不可能真正复兴蝗灾。梦主的作为，只能唤起入梦者的恐惧。
t_en: It was confined within the dream. Even a Stellaron could not truly revive the Swarm Disaster. The Dreammaster's actions could only evoke fear in those already dreaming.

t_ch: 但若考虑到计划的下一步，它又开始变得无比真实——太一之梦笼罩了整个星系，由此，寰宇蝗灾将逐渐与现实无异。
t_en: Yet this Swarm was frighteningly real when you considered the next steps of his plan... Ena's Dream had enveloped the entire star system, which meant the Swarm Disaster would gradually become indistinguishable from reality.

t_ch: 「繁育」将会唤起所有入梦者最原始的恐惧，并以人们的呼唤，延伸「秩序」的命途——直至银河尽归一梦。
t_en: The Propagation would awaken the most primal fears in all dreamers. Through their cries, the Path of Order would be sustained... until the entire cosmos drowned in a singular dream.

t_ch: 而后，在匹诺康尼大剧院，你们与星期日展开了决战——在篡夺了「齐响诗班」之后，他已是毋庸置疑的令使。
t_en: You engaged in a decisive battle with Sunday at the Penacony Grand Theater afterward. He had, without question, become an Emanator at that time after usurping the Harmonious Choir.

t_ch: 但你们毫不畏惧，倾尽全力去对抗他，并在盟友的援助下，将其击败。
t_en: But you showed no fear and gave it your all in your fight against him, and you emerged victorious with the help of your allies.

t_ch: 然而，奋战，挫折，胜利——这一切都是星期日编织的幻觉。「太一之梦」已然笼罩了整个阿斯德纳星系。
t_en: Yet that battle, the setbacks, the victory... was just an illusion woven by Sunday. Ena's Dream had already enveloped the entire Asdana System.

t_ch: 此时的星期日，你们根本无法战胜。而太一之梦是如此可怕，即便是忆者，也无法行动自如。
t_en: It was impossible for you to beat Sunday at that time. Ena's Dream was so terrifying that even Memokeepers could not act freely in it.

t_ch: 但还好，我们先一步去找到了黄泉女士，她伸出援手，让我们能和自己的{RUBY_B#黑天鹅}那位冤家{RUBY_E#}展开行动，试着将人们逐一唤醒。
t_en: Fortunately, we sought out Acheron first, and she lent us a helping hand. That allowed us to take action and try waking people one by one.

t_ch: 是啊，别忘了，在这美梦之中，仍有许多人正在渴望，正在博取，正在奋力前行。
t_en: Indeed. Don't forget that, even within the sweet dream, there were still many people yearning, striving, and pushing forward with all their might.

t_ch: 此时此刻的你，也要迎来相似的死斗。<color=#dbc291ff>以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。</color>
t_en: At that moment, you, too, would face a similar deathmatch. <color=#dbc291ff>Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.</color>

t_ch: 它们并非「不够真实」，而是事物在不同的角度下，总会呈现出不同的样貌…不妨想想，我们何曾{RUBY_B#记忆的倒影}从镜子里{RUBY_E#}看到原本的自己？
t_en: It's not that they're "not real enough." Things always look different when viewed from different angles... Ever thought about whether we've truly seen our authentic selves {RUBY_B#reflection in memory}in a mirror{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 而我，也将无法再给予你任何帮助。
t_en: And from that moment forth... I would also no longer be able to help you.

t_ch: 你的记忆，毕竟只属于你，命运只许我涉入到这种程度。但你一定要记得——
t_en: Your memories belong to you alone at the end of the day. Destiny only allows me to intervene this far. However, you must remember this...

t_ch: 回忆最终如何呈现，是由你决定的。
t_en: How your memories manifest is ultimately up to you.

t_ch: 人们无法梦见未曾见过的事物，他们{RUBY_B#没有勇气面对未来}不敢从梦中醒来{RUBY_E#}，是因为美梦本就是由每个人的过去织就，他们还无法释怀。
t_en: People can't dream of things they've never seen before. They're {RUBY_B#discouraged from facing the future}afraid to wake up{RUBY_E#} because the sweet dream is woven from their own past, a past they still can't let go of.

t_ch: 就像你此时此刻的作为一样，唯有拥抱过去，你才有力量走向未来。
t_en: It's just like your actions at this very moment... Only by embracing the past can you find the strength to walk towards the future.

t_ch: 流萤，我，星核猎手，这个世界…都在等待着你，跨过那一刻。
t_en: Firefly, me, the Stellaron Hunters, this entire world... We're all waiting for you to reach that moment.

t_ch: 我实在难以分辨，这究竟是紧张还是雀跃。{NICKNAME}，你是不同的，唯一的，值得我为之期待的——
t_en: I can hardly tell if this is nervousness or excitement. {NICKNAME}... You are different, unique, and worth waiting for.

t_ch: 去为回忆再度写下开场白吧！
t_en: Go, and write a prelude to memories once more!

t_ch: 在时间的灰烬中，你要重新点燃「命运」。
t_en: From within the ashes of time... You must reignite "destiny."

t_ch: 又一个……
t_en: Not another one...

t_ch: 太好了。感激不尽，黑天鹅小姐。
t_en: Thank you so much, Black Swan.

t_ch: 这下我总算可以松一口气了。
t_en: Finally, I can breathe a sigh of relief.

t_ch: 发生了什么？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 这是什么地方？
t_en: What is this place?

t_ch: 这一幕好像似曾相识…
t_en: The déjà vu is strong with this scene...

t_ch: 我知道你现在一头雾水，我们会尽力为你说明。但讲清一切的来龙去脉之前，你必须明白一件事……
t_en: I understand you must be confused, and we'll do our best to shed light on the situation. However, before that, it's essential to know that...

t_ch: 这里是梦境和现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#dbc291ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
t_en: This place is the rift between dream and reality. A place reserved only for those who have awakened from <color=#dbc291ff>Ena's dream</color>.

t_ch: 还记得那位星期日的野心么？他计划利用星核、橡木家系十万余人的意志，和匹诺康尼众生的愿望，篡夺「同谐」权柄，令「秩序」重现世间。
t_en: Do you remember Sunday's ambitious plan? He intended to harness the power of the Stellaron, the collective will of over <unbreak>100,000</unbreak> Oak Family members, and the desires of everyone in Penacony to usurp the Harmony and restore the Order.

t_ch: 遗憾的是，真相不仅如此。早在进入阿斯德纳之初，我们就已经受到了星核的影响。回想起来，你我相遇的那片陌生梦境，或许就是思绪开始游离的预兆。
t_en: Unfortunately, it didn't stop there. From the early days of our journey into Asdana, we were already affected by the Stellaron. That strange Dreamscape where we met... Maybe it was a sign that your thoughts were beginning to drift away.

t_ch: 这一切都是一场梦？
t_en: All of this is just a dream?

t_ch: 我这是在列车里睡着了？
t_en: Did I fall asleep on the Express?

t_ch: 我回到故事开头了？
t_en: I'm now back at the beginning of the story?

t_ch: 我想…「秩序」的目的并不是让所有人陷入沉睡。正相反，他们利用星核，是为了催化阿斯德纳的忆质渗入物质世界，让「梦境」与「现实」交融。
t_en: I don't think... the goal of the Order was to put everyone into a deep sleep. Quite the contrary — they used the Stellaron to catalyze the leakage of Asdana's memoria into the material world, allowing the Dreamscape to blend with reality.

t_ch: 人们自以为清醒，精神却早已步入「秩序」的殿堂。
t_en: People think they are awake, but their spirits have long since stepped into the temple of Order.

t_ch: 这也正是「太一之梦」的可怕之处。在「秩序」支配的乐园里，每个人都能获得各自美满的梦境，幸福快乐地生活下去。
t_en: This is what makes Ena's Dream so powerful. In this paradise governed by the Order, everyone indulges in their delightful dreams and lives happily ever after.

t_ch: 我想，除了那唯一的一处破绽，你在美梦中经历的仍是真实发生过的。唯有如此，他才能让你抵达理想的终点：解救匹诺康尼的危机，踏上下一段「开拓」之旅。
t_en: I believe what you experienced in the sweet dream, except for that flaw, was real. Only in this way could you reach the destination, lifting the crisis in Penacony and embarking on your next trailblazing expedition.

t_ch: 若非黄泉小姐提前布局，我们或许就要永远沉沦在这场梦中了。
t_en: If it wasn't for Acheron's plan, we might have been trapped in this dream forever.

t_ch: 但我就没这么幸运了，即便身为忆者，也还是会受到「秩序」的影响，陷入幻觉。
t_en: Well, I'm not as fortunate as she is. Even if I'm a Memokeeper, I was still influenced by the power of the Order and fell into hallucinations.

t_ch: 不过，多亏了你的「记忆」，我们现在还有绝处逢生的机会。
t_en: However, thanks to your memories, now we still have a chance to turn the tide.

t_ch: 现在，我们还有一线生机。而要将它付诸现实…黑天鹅小姐，带我们去见见那些同样坚强的人吧。
t_en: We still have a chance, though. To make it happen... please, Black Swan, guide us to those with a strong will.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>梦境的真相不止于此，我们必须告知所有愿意醒来的人，才能携手终结长夜。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The truth of the Dreamscape runs deeper. We must notify anyone willing to wake up, so we can end the long night together.</color>

t_ch: 我敢打赌，就算我不反抗，你也……
t_en: I bet that even if I don't resist, you'd still...

t_ch: 看来该忙正事了，牛仔。
t_en: Time to get down to business, cowboy.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你没事。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you're okay!

t_ch: 能见到你真好。
t_en: It's so great to see you.

t_ch: 我也一样。
t_en: Me too.

t_ch: 其他人呢？
t_en: What about the others?

t_ch: 一位忆者正在寻找他们，我们也必须尽己所能。
t_en: A Memokeeper is looking for them. We must do everything we can as well.

t_ch: 我们缘分不浅啊，朋友——看来你也睡得不沉，改天送你些公司的助眠产品。
t_en: Quite the fateful encounter we have here, friend. Seems you're also a light sleeper. I'll send you some of the IPC's sleep aids one of these days.

t_ch: 可惜，现在我们更应该醒来，而非睡去。仅仅凭借我们，也还完全没有破除「太一之梦」的能力。
t_en: Unfortunately, we need to stay awake right now rather than sleep. We're still nowhere near capable of breaking free from Ena's Dream.

t_ch: 先说一个坏消息吧，我们要面对的敌人，已不再仅仅是星期日了，也不再是他篡夺的「齐响诗班」。
t_en: Let me break the bad news first. The enemy we're up against isn't just Sunday anymore, nor is it the Harmonious Choir that he's usurped.

t_ch: 「梦主」在美梦中唤醒了寰宇蝗灾，并随着太一之梦，在每个入梦者的内心投下了阴影。根植在人们心中的原始恐惧，使他们开始呼唤「秩序」的庇护。
t_en: The Dreammaster has awakened the Swarm Disaster within the sweet dream, and cast shadows into the hearts of all dreamers through Ena's Dream. The primal fear taking root in people's hearts had led them to call out to the Order for protection.

t_ch: 「秩序」的命途正在逐渐复兴，而这…<color=#dbc291ff>使星期日化身为了「太一」。</color>
t_en: The Path of Order is gradually being restored, and this... <color=#dbc291ff>has transformed Sunday into Ena.</color>

t_ch: 还能这样？
t_en: What? That's possible?

t_ch: 「秩序」星神？
t_en: The Aeon of Order?

t_ch: 准确来说，还差一步之遥。公司的星舰恰恰在此时集结，「存护」的力量渗入美梦，让他无法彻底登神，但这只是暂时的。
t_en: Specifically, he's just one step away from becoming an Aeon. The IPC's starships converged here at an opportune moment, and the power of the Preservation seeped into the sweet dream to prevent him from completely ascending. However, that is only temporary.

t_ch: 有星际和平公司在，银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。
t_en: With the IPC around, the cosmos doesn't need a second "Order".

t_ch: 但对我们来说，区别不大。
t_en: But it doesn't make much of a difference for us.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>星期日的正身已然脱离梦境，如星神般庞大，阿斯德纳星系也只是他的掌中之物。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Sunday's true form has broken free from the Dreamscape, becoming as vast as an Aeon. The Asdana system is no more than a plaything in the palm of his hand.</color>

t_ch: 是啊，别说阻止，我们甚至做不到重新面对他。
t_en: Indeed. Forget about stopping him. We can't even manage to face him again.

t_ch: 一定有反击的手段。
t_en: There must be a way to counter him.

t_ch: 不可能没有弱点吧？
t_en: He's got to have a weakness, right?

t_ch: 关键仍然在于「太一之梦」。恐惧和美梦…依靠两种谎言，他们才能汇集入梦者的「同愿」。归根结底，只是勉强扬升的「伪神」。
t_en: The key still lies in Ena's Dream. Fear and sweet dreams... He relies on these two lies to gather the dreamers' "shared wishes." He's still just a "false god" who barely managed to ascend.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要能够让人们醒来，将太一之梦破除，星期日的神格也将随之陨落。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If we can wake people up and break Ena's Dream, Sunday's divinity will fall with it.</color>

t_ch: 但眼下的美梦极为复杂，黑天鹅女士，接下来的情况，能麻烦你来进行解释吗？我毕竟…记性不太好。
t_en: But the current sweet dream is extremely complex. Miss Black Swan, could you please explain the rest of it? My memory... isn't the best, after all.

t_ch: 时间紧迫，我就长话短说了——<color=#dbc291ff>困住我们的梦境，足有「三重」。</color>
t_en: Time is of the essence, so I'll cut to the chase. <color=#dbc291ff>There are "three layers" to the dreamscape trapping us.</color>

t_ch: 其一，是由星期日掌握的「太一之梦」，它为每一个入梦者编织了美好的幻觉，使人们沉沦其中。
t_en: First, there's Ena's Dream controlled by Sunday. It wove a beautiful illusion for every dreamer, making them flounder in it.

t_ch: 其二，是包括流梦礁在内的「原始梦境」，寰宇蝗灾也是在此处的「橡木之梦」中重现，正以恐惧源源不断地壮大「秩序」。
t_en: Second, there's the Primordial Dreamscape, which includes Dreamflux Reef. The Swarm Disaster is manifesting again in the "Oak Dream" within this layer and is continuously empowering the Order through an endless stream of fear.

t_ch: 其三，是由家族建立的「十二时刻」，这里最先与现实开始融合，本身就是一个巨大的陷阱。
t_en: Third, there's the Twelve Hours established by The Family. This layer was the first to merge with reality and is itself an enormous trap.

t_ch: 且先不说如何取胜，<color=#dbc291ff>只有依次将三重梦境全部跨越，我们才能再次直面星期日。</color>
t_en: Forget about winning. <color=#dbc291ff>We need to cross all three layers of the dreamscape before we can even face Sunday again.</color>

t_ch: 我们已经从第一重醒来了吗？
t_en: Have we woken up from the first layer yet?

t_ch: 就这么简单？
t_en: Is it really that simple?

t_ch: 很可惜，我们甚至仍在第一重，也就是「太一之梦」。虽然寻回了自我，但仍在做梦——我们只是串联起了各自的梦境，并非已然逃脱。
t_en: Unfortunately, we're still in the first layer, which is Ena's Dream. Although we've regained our sense of self, we're still dreaming... We've only managed to connect our individual dreamscapes, but have not escaped.

t_ch: 想要将其摧毁，我们就必须让匹诺康尼的所有人，「想要从梦中醒来」。
t_en: To destroy it, we must make everyone in Penacony "want to wake up from their dreams."

t_ch: 该怎么做？
t_en: How do we do that?

t_ch: 现实果然不可小觑…
t_en: Reality sure is a force to be reckoned with...

t_ch: 人对美好幻觉的向往近乎偏执，这种心理会令人下意识地抗拒…残酷的真相。
t_en: Humans' yearning for sweet illusions borders on obsession, leading them to subconsciously resist... the harsh reality.

t_ch: 我也是费心挑选了一个{NICKNAME}全无防备的时刻，引导{M#他}{F#她}亲自揭开真相，才得以让{M#他}{F#她}取回清醒。
t_en: Therefore, I carefully selected a moment where {NICKNAME} was completely unguarded, guiding {M#him}{F#her} to uncover the truth {M#himself}{F#herself} to make {M#him}{F#her} regain {M#his}{F#her} consciousness.

t_ch: 但匹诺康尼的所有人…想让如此规模的人群产生相同的意志，恐怕难如登天。
t_en: However, to wake up everyone in Penacony and get them to share the same determination... that would be nearly impossible.

t_ch: 但无论如何，我们都无法坐视不理。
t_en: But we can't just stay here and do nothing.

t_ch: 这是计划的第一步。在流光忆庭的帮助下，像各位一样足够坚强的人会逐渐从梦中清醒，苏醒的自由意志会成为撼动太一之梦的「不协和音」。
t_en: This is the first step of our plan. With the assistance from the Garden of Recollection, those who possess a strong will, like you, will gradually awaken from the dream. These free wills are the "discord" that will sway Ena's Dream.

t_ch: 但寥寥数十人，在如此庞大的梦境面前无异于沧海一粟。我们必须寻找其他办法，在短时间内唤醒以十万、百万为单位的自由意志。
t_en: However, awakening a mere handful of individuals is insignificant compared to the vast number of people immersed in the dream. We must find other ways to awaken the free will of millions of people within a short period of time.

t_ch: 想来，也只有「结盟玉兆」能做到了。
t_en: Looks like the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath will be the only solution.

t_ch: ——不，没这个必要。
t_en: ...No, no need for that.

t_ch: 犯不着惊动仙舟联盟，一辈子只能用一次的宝贝你好好留着吧。成千上万的自由意志？小意思——
t_en: Keep your once-in-a-lifetime treasure. We don't need to bother the Xianzhou Alliance for such a tiny request. You want thousands of people with unwavering free will? Hah, that's easy...

t_ch: 交给「巡海游侠」来解决。
t_en: Just leave it to us Galaxy Rangers.

t_ch: 黄泉，知道这是什么吗？
t_en: Do you know what it is, Acheron?

t_ch: 是我交还给你的「遗物」。
t_en: It's the relic I returned to you.

t_ch: 对。它的主人一定告诉过你，这东西对巡海游侠以外的人一文不值，只有物归原主才能发挥作用。
t_en: Exactly. Its owner must have told you that it's meaningless to anyone other than a Galaxy Ranger, and that it can only fulfill its purpose when returned to its rightful owner.

t_ch: 因为这是一件随葬品，只有为巡海游侠立下赫赫战功的英雄才配拥有。当它的光芒出现在宇宙，也就意味着一颗巨星的陨落，而它落下的方向……
t_en: Because it's a burial artifact, worthy only of a hero who has served the Galaxy Rangers with honor. When its light illuminates the universe, it means the fall of a hero, and in the direction it falls...

t_ch: 会有无数流星划破天际，那是巡海游侠集结的火光。他们从银河四方赶来，不问缘由，不计代价，只因我们遵守一条共同的底线——
t_en: Countless meteors will streak across the sky. Those "meteors" are Galaxy Rangers coming from all corners of the Cosmos, driven by a shared purpose, without questioning the cause or counting the cost. Because we abide by a bottom line...

t_ch: 「巡猎」的飞星，只会坠落在最漫长的夜晚，而在它身后——将是黎明的到来。
t_en: The shooting stars of The Hunt only descend on the longest night, and with them... comes the dawn.

t_ch: 我们已经沉寂了太久。是时候让全宇宙的懦夫、蛀虫和压迫者重新想起巡海游侠的名字了，就由我来打响第一枪。
t_en: We've stayed silent for far too long. Now, it's time to remind all the cowards, oppressors, and villains of the universe of our presence! I'll be the one to ignite the first spark.

t_ch: 这足以延缓他登神的进展，至于太一之梦的根基，则需要极为强大的力量，在刹那间加以动摇。
t_en: This should be enough to delay his ascension to godhood. As for the foundation of Ena's Dream, it would take an immense power to shake it in an instant.

t_ch: 我想…这也不难。
t_en: I think... That shouldn't be too hard.

t_ch: 所以，最终还是回到了你这边，是吗？
t_en: So, you're the key in the end, I assume?

t_ch: 即便只是赝作，也非得由一位令使出手不可。
t_en: Even if it is just a counterfeit god, we'll need an Emanator to step in.

t_ch: 或许与令使的身份无关…这是迥然不同的「众愿」，我将倾尽所能——<color=#dbc291ff>为你们斩落恶神。</color>
t_en: Perhaps it's not about being an Emanator... This is a different "collective wish." I will do everything in my power... <color=#dbc291ff>to strike down that evil god for you all.</color>

t_ch: 剩下的两重梦境呢？
t_en: What about the other two dreamscape layers?

t_ch: 无可奈何，甚至更加危险。
t_en: There's nothing we can do about them. They're even more dangerous.

t_ch: 不同于此刻的集结——太一之梦的消散需要时间，足以引起{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}的注意。
t_en: Unlike our current gathering, the dissipation of Ena's Dream will take time, which will draw {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#}'s attention.

t_ch: 是啊，<color=#dbc291ff>前往下一重梦境后，我们就要直面星神的力量。但在那之前，我们已经出完了全部底牌。</color>
t_en: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>Once we enter the next layer of the Dreamscape, we'll be facing an Aeon's strength head-on. But by then, we'll have played all our cards.</color>

t_ch: 不能等其他人醒来吗？
t_en: Can't we wait for the others to wake up?

t_ch: 太一之梦也绝非等闲，我和康士坦丝倾尽全力，也只能寻得眼前的寥寥诸位，再难有其他援手。
t_en: Ena's Dream is no ordinary matter. Even with Constance and me giving it our all, we could only reach the few of you here. It's impossible to find more help.

t_ch: 至于美梦之外，只能指望其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
t_en: As for beyond the sweet dream, our only hope lies in intervention from other Aeons... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.

t_ch: 「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
t_en: The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.

t_ch: 外界不会有人注意到吗？
t_en: Won't anyone on the outside notice?

t_ch: 来不及了，除非有其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
t_en: It's too late. Unless another Aeon intervenes... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.

t_ch: 「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
t_en: The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.

t_ch: 太一之梦也绝非等闲，我和康士坦丝倾尽全力，也只能寻得眼前的寥寥诸位，再难有其他援手。
t_en: Ena's Dream is no ordinary matter. Even with Constance and me giving it our all, we could only reach the few of you here. It's impossible to find more help.

t_ch: 但时机稍纵即逝，我们必须自救。
t_en: But time is of the essence. We must take our fate into our own hands.

t_ch: 说白了，想要苟且偷生的人总会死去，敢面对死亡的人才能活下来——我喜欢。
t_en: In other words, those who only want to survive by playing it safe will die, while those who dare to face death head-on will live. I like that.

t_ch: 那您可以自己去死，砂金先生，我们的时候未到。
t_en: Then you can go die yourself, Mr. Aventurine. Our time hasn't come yet.

t_ch: 就这么几个人？哦，也够了。
t_en: Just these few people? Oh well, that'll do.

t_ch: 你怎么也在？
t_en: Oh, you're here too?

t_ch: 未成年不能参与。
t_en: Minors are not allowed.

t_ch: 别叫，想想你自己才多大。
t_en: Quiet down. You're just a kid yourself.

t_ch: 不光匹诺康尼，整个阿斯德纳星系全完了。
t_en: It's not just Penacony. The entire Asdana system is done for.

t_ch: …星核猎手？
t_en: ...A Stellaron Hunter?

t_ch: 她身处阿斯德纳星系边缘，但还是被卷了进来，只是找到她一个人，我几乎就要油尽灯枯了。
t_en: She was at the edge of the Asdana system, but she still got dragged into this mess. Just finding her nearly wiped me out.

t_ch: 豪迈的投资风格！说说看吧——这么大的风险，能带来什么收获？
t_en: Quite a bold investment strategy! Tell me, with such a huge risk, what kind of payoff are we talking about?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>另外两重梦境，星核猎手来搞定。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The other two layers of the dreamscape will be handled by the Stellaron Hunters.</color>

t_ch: 我们的一位合作者，正在十二时刻寻找另一个{RUBY_B#「秩序」之子}「同谐」神选{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: One of our associates is searching in the Twelve Hours for {RUBY_B#the child of Order}the other person chosen by the Harmony{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 哦？知更鸟小姐？
t_en: Oh? Miss Robin?

t_ch: 她靠自己的力量挣脱了太一之梦，而且给沉睡的人们，留下了一支「歌」。
t_en: She broke free from Ena's Dream through her own strength and left behind a "song" for those in slumber.

t_ch: 人固然有强大与弱小之分，倘若「开拓」是英雄的使命，那么「同谐」的责任便是以强援弱，因为匹诺康尼的救世主，只能是匹诺康尼人自己。
t_en: It's true that some people are born strong, and others are born weak. If the Trailblaze is the target of heroes, then the Harmony will guarantee that the strong help the weak. Only the people of Penacony themselves can be the saviors of their homeland.

t_ch: 每个人的幸福和道路应当由他自己开创。虽然我不是无名客，但也愿意将飞上天空的勇气传递给每一个需要它的人。
t_en: Their path of happiness should be forged by themselves. While I may not be a Nameless, I'm willing to instill courage in all those who need it.

t_ch: 这其中也包括我的哥哥。太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
t_en: This includes my brother as well. Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.

t_ch: 原来如此…看来我们能够苏醒，当中也有知更鸟小姐的帮助。可是…人性的弱点绝非一朝一夕能够克服，仅凭这些努力，真的能让所有人弃暗投明么？
t_en: I see... So we were able to wake up thanks to Miss Robin's help. But... The flaws rooted in human nature can't be eradicated overnight. Do you believe that these efforts alone are enough to convince everyone to choose the right path?

t_ch: 诚然如此，黑天鹅小姐。所以，计划中最重要的一环不是让所有人弃暗投明……
t_en: I agree with you, Black Swan. That's why the most critical aspect of this plan is not to convince everyone to choose the right path...

t_ch: ——而是让所有人选择自救。
t_en: ...But to inspire them to save themselves.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她们会搞点大动静出来，为你们破除十二时刻。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>They'll stir up something big to help break you free from the Twelve Hours.</color>

t_ch: 至于「原始梦境」，萨姆正在待命，就等你们挣脱太一之梦了。
t_en: As for the Primordial Dreamscape, SAM is standing by, just waiting for you to break free from Ena's Dream.

t_ch: 她还好吗？
t_en: Is she okay?

t_ch: 会怎么做？
t_en: What will she do?

t_ch: 听了以后，你别急。
t_en: Now. I'll tell you, but don't panic.

t_ch: 她会死，面对所有想要逃避的东西，第二次死去。
t_en: She will die. She will die a second time, facing everything she wants to run away from.

t_ch: 但她的结局，会由你来决定。她会为你们破除第二重梦境，然后坠入还没彻底消散的太一之梦。
t_en: But her fate will be determined by you. She will help you break through the second layer of the dreamscape. Then she'll fall into Ena's Dream, which hasn't fully dissipated yet.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>如果你战胜了星期日，让她从梦中醒来，这一次死亡，也会成为一场幻梦。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If you defeat Sunday and wake her from that dream, then her second death, too, will become nothing but an illusion.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而如果失败了，梦境最终会与现实完全融合，她的死亡就会成为事实。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But if you fail, the dreamscape will ultimately merge completely with reality, and her death will become a fact.</color>

t_ch: 我不会让她死去。
t_en: I won't let her die.

t_ch: 她的梦值得更好的结局。
t_en: Her dream deserves a better ending.

t_ch: 可是，这还是没有解决最根本的问题。{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}该怎么办？在跨越三重梦境的时刻，他只需一次注视，就能抹杀我们全部的努力。
t_en: But that still doesn't solve the fundamental problem. What about {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#}? He could wipe out all our efforts with no more than a glance the moment we cross the three dreamscape layers.

t_ch: 忆者女士，回忆的时候到了——在橡木之梦里，我对你们说过一句话。
t_en: Miss Memokeeper, it's time for a game of recall. I once said something to you lot back in the Oak Dream.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要我「底牌未出」，没有一个人敢跟注到底。</color>现在，是揭开那张牌的时候了。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>So long as my "trump card" remains unplayed, none will dare see the hand through to the end.</color> And now, it's time to reveal that ace.

t_ch: 我来指出两个错误吧，一个是你们的——
t_en: Let me point out two mistakes. One of them... is yours.

t_ch: 亲身到过梦主计划的腹地，难道我不会想办法告知公司？舰队开拔，一开始就不是为了正面冲突。
t_en: Having personally been to the heartland of the Dreammaster's plans, wouldn't I have already found a way to inform the IPC? The fleet's deployment was never meant for a direct confrontation.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那是为了给梦中的「存护」之心，打下根基。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It was to seed the Preservation's heart into the dream.</color>

t_ch: 另一个，则是星期日的错误，而且绝对致命——他不该收缴「基石」，而应该一开始就把我赶出去。
t_en: The other mistake was Sunday's, and it was a fatal one. He should never have confiscated my Cornerstone. He should have kicked me out right from the start.

t_ch: 和我进行的赌局总是如此——你坐上赌桌的那一刻，就已经输了。
t_en: That's how every gamble with me goes. The moment you sat down at my table... You've already lost.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>一道「翡翠」色的光芒，仍然沉于梦境的深处。而它的解放，不需要持有者在场。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A jade-colored light still sleeps deep within the dreamscape, and it does not require the presence of its owner to unleash its powers.</color>

t_ch: 在此之后呢？石心十人的力量，也不可能撼动接近星神的存在。
t_en: So what? Even the power of the Ten Stonehearts can't rattle an existence already approaching Aeonhood.

t_ch: 所以我才会说：银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。梦主的计划确实天衣无缝…然而，面对虫灾的恐惧，呼唤「存护」，难道有何不同吗？
t_en: That's why I said the cosmos no longer needs a second Order. The Dreammaster's plan is indeed flawless... However, when faced with the terror of the Swarm Disaster, how is calling for the Preservation any different from calling for the Order?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#翡翠}基石{RUBY_E#}的解放将会汲取入梦者的「欲望」，给出「存护」的许诺，引领他们如此呼唤——一切献给，琥珀王！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The release of {RUBY_B#Jade}the Cornerstone{RUBY_E#}'s powers will absorb the dreamers' desires and offer them the Preservation's promise instead, guiding them to cry out these words... All for the Amber Lord!</color>

t_ch: 这才是公司真正的意图？从命途的层面，完全夺回匹诺康尼？
t_en: Is this the IPC's real goal? To completely take back Penacony on a conceptual Path level?

t_ch: 怎么，觉得我也在轻视别人的信仰吗？巧了，这就是公司的信仰——<color=#dbc291ff>别怀疑自己冷酷无情，重要的是每股收益。</color>
t_en: What, you think I'm also trampling over others' beliefs? Heh. Sorry, but that's exactly what the IPC believes in: <color=#dbc291ff>Don't question your own ruthlessness. All that matters is profit.</color>

t_ch: 寰宇蝗灾曾经是如何结束，现在也将如何结束。「锤音」将响彻阿斯德纳，从命途层面夺取「秩序」的力量，进行反击，让{RUBY_B#太一}星期日{RUBY_E#}无力顾及你们的行动。
t_en: The new Swarm Disaster will end the same way as it ended before. The Hammer Strike will echo throughout Asdana, seizing the Order's powers on the level of Paths to launch our counter-attack, leaving {RUBY_B#Ena}Sunday{RUBY_E#} powerless to interfere with your actions.

t_ch: 但琥珀纪不会因此翻开下一页——<color=#dbc291ff>今日的锤击，不是星神的怒火，而是人反击的号声。</color>
t_en: But a new Amber Era will not arrive because of that. <color=#dbc291ff>Today's Hammer Strike is not the wrath of an Aeon, but humanity's battle cry of defiance.</color>

t_ch: 那一刻，我会屏息聆听。
t_en: I'll hold my breath and listen for that moment.

t_ch: 计划一旦成功，我们就能剥夺星期日的神格，但也无力参与此后的战斗。所以……
t_en: Once our plan succeeds, we can strip Sunday of his godhood, but we'll be too drained to join the battle afterward. So...

t_ch: 我会去击败他！
t_en: I'll defeat him!

t_ch: 我会让所有人醒来！
t_en: I'll wake everyone up!

t_ch: 我会让匹诺康尼拥有明天！
t_en: I will give Penacony a tomorrow!

t_ch: 我会，开拓下去！
t_en: I will keep trailblazing forward!

t_ch: 你可以再稍作准备。出发之前，{NICKNAME}，可以再来找我单独谈谈吗？还有件事，我有义务向你说明。
t_en: Take your time to prepare. Before you head out, may I have a moment alone with you, {NICKNAME}? There's one more thing I need to explain to you.

t_ch: 是你…我一直都很想见见你。我很好奇，为何她会如此地珍视你的存在？
t_en: It's you... I've been wanting to meet you. I'm curious. Why does she value your existence so much?

t_ch: 好了，现在不是时候。
t_en: Not now. This is not the time.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，过去我常常感慨：命运啊，你要往何处去。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I used to wonder about destiny, about where it's heading.

t_ch: 至少今天，你能亲自决定它的去向——越是最后的舞台，登上它时，越要从容自若。
t_en: But you can decide its destination at least for today. The bigger the stage, the more you need to be composed when stepping onto it.

t_ch: 我们一直都对星核猎手很感兴趣，等了结这一切后，要不要谈谈？
t_en: We've always been interested in the Stellaron Hunters. How about we have a chat after all this is over?

t_ch: …谈谈？你是盯上赏金了吧，别来沾边。
t_en: ...A chat? You're just after my bounty, aren't you? Stay in your lane.

t_ch: 哈哈，怎么会！你要是在意赏金，我再给多加个十亿，如何？
t_en: Haha! No way I'm just after that! If you're worried about the bounty, how about I add another billion to that number?

t_ch: 既然分工完毕，咱们就出发去往各自的战场吧！准备好——大干一场！
t_en: Now that our roles are assigned, let's get to our battlefields and pose a grand finale!

t_ch: 去吧，{NICKNAME}，我想说什么，你一定知道。
t_en: Go, {NICKNAME}. You already know what I want to say.

t_ch: 这场盛大的宴会快要结束了。这里便是前往最后舞台的起点…也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。
t_en: This grand festival is drawing to its close. This is the starting point for the ultimate stage of our journey... just as it marked the beginning of all the stories in Penacony.

t_ch: 你…做好准备了么？
t_en: ...Are you ready?

t_ch: 前往最后的舞台。
t_en: Head to the final stage.

t_ch: 前往故事的起点。
t_en: Head to where the story began.

t_ch: 很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
t_en: Very well. Now, please close your eyes...

t_ch: 一点萤火，一声惋叹——{RUBY_B#奔赴虚无至暗}正因生命敢于沉睡{RUBY_E#}，{RUBY_B#必将寻获明光}他们才能醒来{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: A glimmer of fireflies, a sigh of regret... It is because {RUBY_B#rushing towards the darkest void}life dares to slumber{RUBY_E#} that {RUBY_B#will inevitably find bright light}they can awaken{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 还没有做好准备…
t_en: I'm not quite ready yet...

t_ch: 没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
t_en: That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.

t_ch: 太一之梦 永恒的正午十二时
t_en: Ena's Dream, the eternal high noon...

t_ch: 我…醒过来了吗？
t_en: Am I... awake?

t_ch: 对不起，知更鸟，唯独你…我不想你知道这一切。可惜，事与愿违。
t_en: Sorry, Robin, it's just you... I did not wish for you to know this. It's a pity that things have turned out this way.

t_ch: 于律法之中，人类构建社会……
t_en: Within the foundation of law, humanity establishes civilization...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>于「同谐」之中，我们拥获「秩序」。</color>
t_en: And through Harmony, we obtain Order.

t_ch: 哥哥，你还是把「秩序」的美梦…带给了我们的乐园？
t_en: My brother... Did you still bring the Order's sweet dream into our paradise?

t_ch: 都这会了，就别攀关系啦——你的哥哥，已经不存在了哦？现在，你应该叫祂「太一」。
t_en: Oww, you're still trying to play the family card at this hour? Your brother doesn't exist anymore. As of now, you'd better call THEM... Ena.

t_ch: 哎呀，真了不起，你还真的自己醒过来啦？
t_en: Impressive! You really woke up on your own!

t_ch: 我再重申一次——如果你玩够了，那还是趁早离开为好。「同谐」的乐章不能容忍杂音。
t_en: Let me reiterate. If you've had your fill, it'd be wise to leave before it's too late. The music of the Harmony doesn't tolerate discord.

t_ch: 哎呀，那我也重申一次——我该做的事都做完了，接下来就只等看烟花咯。
t_en: Owwww. Then I'll reiterate as well. I've done my part, and now I'm simply waiting for the fireworks to begin.

t_ch: 你不妨有话直说。
t_en: Why don't you just cut to the chase?

t_ch: 时间不多，长话短说——呀，还押韵了呢，我真棒！
t_en: Time's short, so I'll condense the report. Oho! That even rhymed! I'm so talented~!

t_ch: 有个多管闲事的焚化工，她在你身上留了个小玩意儿，想要用它烧掉美梦给你的幻景，让你能从太一之梦里醒过来——但现在看来，你也用不上嘛。
t_en: A nosy Cremator left something on you. She wanted to use it to burn down the illusions you received from the sweet dream, allowing you to wake up from Ena's Dream... Buuut it looks like you don't need it anymore.

t_ch: …那么，你又为何能出现在这里？
t_en: ...Then, how were you able to reach this place?

t_ch: 这个嘛……
t_en: Well...

t_ch: 愚者千面，能让我满意的美梦，一时半会可编不出来。
t_en: A fool has thousands of faces. It's gonna take a lot to create a sweet dream that can satisfy me.

t_ch: 你和我…我们都还能最后清醒一小会儿。
t_en: Both you and I... can still stay awake for just a little bit longer.

t_ch: 只是一会儿吗……
t_en: Just a little bit...?

t_ch: 实话说，我根本用不着来找你的，但谁叫花火大人心地善良呢？我杀过你一次，想给你个机会找回场子。
t_en: Honestly, I don't even need to find you, but I am just sooo kind. I've already killed you once to give you a chance to regain your home field advantage.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼还醒着的「东道主」，就剩你一个啦，<color=#dbc291ff>所以，想不想来玩一场轮盘游戏——赌注是整个盛会之星</color>。
t_en: You're the last "festival host" awake in Penacony. <color=#dbc291ff>So, do you want to play a round of roulette? The wager will be the entire Planet of Festivities.</color>

t_ch: 最好别轻举妄动——你来到我面前，究竟想干什么？
t_en: Stay where you are! What are you trying to do by showing up in front of me?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>想让你看着我把整个匹诺康尼炸上天</color>。然后，其他人才能开始反击，一块儿醒过来。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I want you to watch me blow up all of Penacony</color>. Only then can everyone else launch a counterattack and wake up together.

t_ch: 想想看，你哥哥已经是天空外的神了。不把天空撕开个口子，可是连面都见不着。
t_en: Think about it. Your brother is already a god beyond the heavens. You're not gonna even see him unless you rip open the sky.

t_ch: 电车难题听说过没？选一个吧——大家一起玩完，还是让匹诺康尼付出点「小小的牺牲」？
t_en: Ever heard of the trolley problem? Make your choice. Do you want everyone to go down together, or to have Penacony make a "small sacrifice"?

t_ch: 我为何要相信一名假面愚者的说辞？
t_en: Why should I trust the words of a Masked Fool?

t_ch: 别以为我在吓唬你，匹诺康尼到处是我埋下的炸弹，花了不少功夫呢。
t_en: Don't think that I'm just trolling you. My bombs are hidden all over Penacony. They took a really long time to set up, you know.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，要不要我先引爆几颗，让你先看看效果？我瞧瞧哪边的……
t_en: Teehee~ Maybe I should blow up a few to demonstrate how they look? Lemme see... which ones should I choose...

t_ch: …停手吧。
t_en: ...Stop.

t_ch: 在你那样做之后…入梦者会怎么样？
t_en: What's gonna happen to the dreamers... once the bombs go off?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>全都得死。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>They will all die.</color>

t_ch: …那你应该知道，我不可能同意。
t_en: ...Then you know I'd never agree to it.

t_ch: 该取舍的时候，现实可由不得你。难道你还想再来一遍「同谐」一视同仁的笑话？
t_en: When it's time to make a sacrifice, reality won't be giving you any choices. Or do you want to replay the old joke about the Harmony treating everyone the same?

t_ch: 「生命」在任何时候都不是笑话，愚者。这个世界上从不存在次要的恶行，它和道德一样，不能被丈量，也不能用来对比。
t_en: "Life" is never a joke, Fool. There is no such thing as a lesser evil in this world. Evil, just like morality, cannot be measured, nor can it be compared.

t_ch: 那不还是「同谐」那一套嘛，不过，这倒正合我意——我不是说了嘛，这是个轮盘游戏，不是爆破表演。
t_en: Isn't that still the Harmony's same old song and dance? But that suits me just fine. Didn't I already say this is a round of roulette, and not an ammunition showcase?

t_ch: 准备歌唱吧，就像一只小鸟。<color=#dbc291ff>如果你能让那位希佩听见，祂也不会看着我炸死所有人的，对吧？</color>
t_en: Get ready to sing. Be like a bird. <color=#dbc291ff>If you can make Xipe hear you, then THEY definitely won't allow me to blow everyone to pieces, right?</color>

t_ch: 现在你会怎么选？要不眼睁睁看着我炸飞这里，要么就试试看，至少能救他们的命。
t_en: What will you choose now? You can either watch as I blow the entire place up, or you can try to save their lives.

t_ch: 说不定，这就是你最后一场演出了哦？
t_en: Maybe this will be your last ever performance.

t_ch: 最后一次……
t_en: Last ever performance...

t_ch: …怎么，紧张了？也是，第一次登上这么隆重的舞台，就该紧张些。
t_en: ...You feeling nervous? I know the feeling. You should feel nervous when going up on such a big stage for the first time.

t_ch: …还好，只是回忆起了一些事。
t_en: ...I'm okay. I just remembered something, that's all.

t_ch: 舒翁女士，在你看来，<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#生命因何而沉睡}鸟为什么要飞上天空{RUBY_E#}？</color>
t_en: Miss Siobhan... <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#Why does life slumber}Why do you think birds fly{RUBY_E#}?</color>

t_ch: …怎么突然问起这个？
t_en: ...Why're you asking that all of a sudden?

t_ch: 第一次听到的时候，我也这么想——离开匹诺康尼前，哥哥就是这么问我的，我总是忍不住要思考。
t_en: That was my response as well the first time I heard that question... It's what my brother asked me before I left Penacony. I keep finding myself thinking about it.

t_ch: 不知道，我该飞时就飞，不想飞了就下来，没有为什么。
t_en: I don't know. I fly when it's time to fly, and I stop when I don't want to fly anymore. There's no reason.

t_ch: …那舒翁女士的答案，会和我的很像呢。
t_en: ...It seems that your answer is really similar to mine.

t_ch: 您也问过我「因何而唱」，我想，这两个问题，我可以一起回答。
t_en: You've also asked me "why do I sing." I think I can answer both of these questions in one go.

t_ch: 最初，我的想法还不是这样，我想要歌唱，是因为一个特殊的契机——
t_en: The answer wasn't what I initially had in mind. Originally, I wanted to sing because of something specific that I experienced...

t_ch: 在我还小的时候，星核落入了我的故乡，眼前一切顷刻毁败，甚至没有给我们留下任何反应的空间，无论做什么，都为时已晚。
t_en: A Stellaron fell onto my homeworld when I was young. Everything I knew was instantly destroyed. We didn't even get a chance to react to it. No matter what we did, it was too late.

t_ch: 不知为何，母亲试着安抚我和哥哥时，却选择了哼唱一段曲调。
t_en: But for some reason, my mother chose to hum a song when she tried to comfort me and my brother.

t_ch: 我也记得。而且，大家都认为，你是因此才选择了歌唱。
t_en: I remember that story. Everyone thought that's why you decided to sing.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>不——这段经历只会让我憎恨歌唱。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>No... That experience only made me detest singing.</color>

t_ch: 长久以来，我都是这样认为：灾难发生时，一首歌改变不了任何事，它简直是世界上最没用的东西。
t_en: I've believed for a long time that songs can't change anything when disasters strike... That music is the most useless thing in this world.

t_ch: 尽管我拥有出众的音律天赋，也会发自内心，为歌唱时的每一个瞬间感到喜悦…但它的「无用」，也总是令我感到惆怅。
t_en: I might be extraordinarily talented in singing, and I might feel super happy whenever I sang... But its futility had always made me depressed.

t_ch: …后来呢？
t_en: ...Then, what changed?

t_ch: 我渐渐长大，有时会发现，哥哥也会时不时哼唱同一段曲调，那时，我以为他在想念妈妈，却又不好意思直说，想要去安慰他。
t_en: I grew up, and I realized that my brother would sometimes hum the same tune as my mother did. And I thought maybe he missed her, but I was too embarrassed to point that out. I tried to comfort him instead.

t_ch: 而他的回答，让我知道了，自己该因何而唱——
t_en: However, his answer to me made me realize what I should be singing for...

t_ch: 当然，他并没有直接给我答案，但却开始让我思考…有些事，是否根本不需要理由和意义？
t_en: Obviously, he didn't give me an answer directly, but it got me to think... Maybe some things don't need a reason or meaning at all?

t_ch: 为了匹诺康尼的未来，放手去做吧，愚者——但我不会让任何人受到伤害。
t_en: Go and do what must be done, Fool. It's for the sake of Penacony's future... But I won't let anyone get hurt.

t_ch: …呀，你刚才是不是突然回忆杀了？更期待了呢。
t_en: ...Ooh, did you just have a flashback? Now I'm even more excited!

t_ch: 最后一次了，万一你死掉，想让人们怎么回忆你的结局？
t_en: Lemme check one last time. If you were to die, how would you want people to remember your ending?

t_ch: 「她一生如鸟，优雅从容，此刻微启唇喙，一声惋叹，轻如羽落」——喜欢吗？
t_en: "Like a bird, she lived her life, graceful and composed. Now her beak parts slightly with a sigh, as soft as falling feathers." Like it?

t_ch: 收起你的虚饰吧，歌唱需要的，只有「真挚」。
t_en: Drop the sanctimonious mask. Singing only needs one thing, and that's "sincerity."

t_ch: 哥哥，<color=#dbc291ff>生来拥有翅膀的鸟儿，飞上天际时不需要理由。</color>
t_en: My brother... <color=#dbc291ff>Birds born with wings need no reason to soar into the sky.</color>

t_ch: 而被迫{RUBY_B#无法醒来}「坠落于地」{RUBY_E#}的，也不需要高高在上的同情。
t_en: And those forced to {RUBY_B#unable to wake up}"fall back to earth"{RUBY_E#} don't need anyone's condescending sympathy.

t_ch: 天空与大地，是彼此的「证明」与「向往」——
t_en: The sky and earth are each other's "proof" and "aspiration"...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#醒来的人们}飞翔的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}低头俯视，会发现坠落之后，生命也仍有希望持续。
t_en: When {RUBY_B#the waking ones}a soaring bird{RUBY_E#} looks down below, it discovers that even after falling, life still holds hope to continue.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#沉睡的人们}坠落的鸟儿{RUBY_E#}抬头仰望，会发现再度飞翔的可能，仍然存在于这世界上。
t_en: And when {RUBY_B#the sleeping ones}a fallen bird{RUBY_E#} looks up to the sky, it discovers that the possibility of soaring once again still exists in this world.

t_ch: 或许他们永远不会理解彼此，但人们需要的从来不是理解，而是在他人选择的生存方式面前，多一点点体谅，必要时，也伸出援手——
t_en: Perhaps they'll never truly understand each other, but what people need isn't understanding. It's showing a little more compassion for the way others choose to live, and when necessary, extending a helping hand...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>即使你成为了唯一的星，阻止所有人飞上天际——他们也会因你的光芒，产生向往，奋力拍打自己的翅膀，无论是否曾在坠落时受伤。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Even if you become the only star and prevent everyone from soaring into the sky... they will still be inspired by your radiance, flap their wings with all their might, regardless of whether they've been hurt in their fall.</color>

t_ch: 所以，「秩序」的美梦终将破灭。三重面相的神明啊…若我踏上了「同谐」的道路，请伸出援手，庇护信奉你的人们。
t_en: Thus, the Order's sweet dream will eventually fall. O, Triple-Faced God... If I manage to step onto the Path of Harmony, then please extend your hand and shelter those who believe in you.

t_ch: 而如果，我是注定坠亡的鸟儿，无法再次歌唱——<color=#dbc291ff>我摔落于地面的声音，或许会是我最后的「同谐」乐章，但却绝不会成为这个世界的绝响！</color>
t_en: And if I am a bird destined to fall, doomed to never again sing... <color=#dbc291ff>Then, while the sound of me hitting the ground may be my last note for the Harmony, it will never be this world's swansong!</color>

t_ch: 以{RUBY_B#逐梦者}美梦{RUBY_E#}的名义，谐乐大典，就此开幕！
t_en: In the name of the {RUBY_B#dreamchasers}sweet dream{RUBY_E#}, the Charmony Festival... Now begins!

t_ch: 哥哥，你…想家了吗？
t_en: Brother, do you... miss home?

t_ch: 就算想，一切也都为时已晚。
t_en: Even if I do, it's too late.

t_ch: 可是，你在唱的，是妈妈唱过的歌……
t_en: But you're singing the song Mom used to sing...

t_ch: 因为，<color=#dbc291ff>哪怕一切为时已晚，我们还是能去唱…自己能唱的歌。</color>
t_en: Because... <color=#dbc291ff>Even if it's too late, we still have the choice to sing whatever we can.</color>

t_ch: 与此同时：故事的起点 亦是 最后的舞台
t_en: At the same time: The beginning of the story, and also, the final stage

t_ch: 欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
t_en: Welcome to Horizon of Existence...

t_ch: 这里是{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}的万千表征之一，但同样，也是清醒之人告别「虚无」的出口。
t_en: This place is one of the thousands of manifestations belonging to {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#}, and it's also an exit out of the Nihility for the awake ones.

t_ch: 因此，我们就在这作最后的道别吧。
t_en: Let's bid our final farewells here.

t_ch: 记住自己的名字，我会在尽头等你。
t_en: Remember your name. I'll be waiting for you at the end.

t_ch: 不是，我看过「剧本」的，你问我？
t_en: Hey, I've read the "script"! Why are you asking me?

t_ch: 如果我失败了呢？
t_en: What if I fail?

t_ch: 那就拼命别输。
t_en: Then do your best to not fail.

t_ch: 我们会醒来吗？
t_en: Will we wake up?

t_ch: 只要你别怕睡着，就一定能醒。
t_en: As long as you're not afraid to fall asleep, you'll definitely wake up.

t_ch: 还不到留愿望的时候帕！
t_en: It's not the time to leave your final words yet!

t_ch: 我们都相信你。
t_en: We all believe in you.

t_ch: 你也要相信我们。
t_en: You need to believe in us too.

t_ch: 开拓之旅不会就此结束。
t_en: The trailblazing expedition won't end here.

t_ch: 我们会一起醒来。
t_en: We'll wake up together.

t_ch: 是啊，生命因何而沉睡…我们仍未知晓这一问的答案，却已然要从这场梦中清醒。
t_en: Why does life slumber...? We don't know the answer yet, but we're about to awaken from this dream.

t_ch: 又或者，这就是答案本身。
t_en: Or perhaps, such is the answer itself.

t_ch: 刚才的那些是……
t_en: Those things were...?

t_ch: 是最先从美梦中挣脱的人们——沉眠无相者瞥见了他们的愿望。
t_en: It's the people who first broke free from the sweet dream. The sleeping and shapeless caught a glimpse of their desires.

t_ch: 正因怀抱这些愿望，他们才有能力做梦。正因从未实现过这些愿望，他们才有能力醒来。
t_en: It was because they held onto these desires that they could dream. It was because these desires were never fulfilled that they could wake up.

t_ch: 愿望实现之后…
t_en: So, after a wish comes true...

t_ch: …反而会感到虚无吧？
t_en: ...People would feel nihilistic?

t_ch: 我想…并不尽然。我情愿人们能够幸福，但我沾染过太多的无…有时也不禁这样想——
t_en: I think... that's not entirely true. I wish people could find happiness, but I've been tainted by too much nihilism... Sometimes I can't help but think...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「虚无」是骄傲而又可怕的梦。招致它的，不是得到，也不是失去，而是道路的断绝，甚至…欲望的丧失。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That the Nihility is a proud and terrifying dream. It's brought forth not by gain or loss, but by the severing of roads, or even... the loss of desire itself.</color>

t_ch: 实现心愿，当然能够带来生存的喜悦。但若是此后，再也没有新的愿望，浮现在人们的心间……
t_en: Fulfilling a wish can certainly make people feel the joy of being alive, but if no new wishes ever surfaced again in people's hearts...

t_ch: 就会看见虚无。
t_en: ...Then they will gaze upon nihility.

t_ch: 秩序的美梦，正是如此。
t_en: That's what the Order's sweet dream is all about.

t_ch: 是啊…「虚无」这道影子的背后，也一定存在着世间最猛烈的光源。
t_en: Indeed... Behind the shadow of the Nihility, there must exist the most blazing source of light in the world.

t_ch: 正如每一个迈向死亡的生命都在热烈地生长，向着「虚无」的尽头……
t_en: Just as every life that edges closer to death fervently approaches the end of the Nihility...

t_ch: 我们追逐那最初的光。
t_en: We must pursue that primordial light.

t_ch: 临行前，你愿意告诉我…你的愿望吗？
t_en: Before you go... Would you tell me your wish?

t_ch: 先找到自己所爱…
t_en: First, find what I love...

t_ch: 然后拼命让它们不被夺走…
t_en: Then fight tooth and nail to keep it from being taken away...

t_ch: 哪怕一切终会离我而去…
t_en: Even if I lose everything at the end...

t_ch: 我也会义无反顾地开拓下去。
t_en: I will continue to trailblaze without hesitation.

t_ch: 我很高兴。答案并不重要，重要的是你已作出决定。
t_en: I'm glad. The answer itself doesn't matter. What matters is that you've made a decision.

t_ch: 你的愿望呢？
t_en: What about your wish?

t_ch: 只剩一个「名字」…一个我「本是」，现在却渴望「成为」的人。
t_en: Only a "name" remains... A person that I "was," and now want to "become."

t_ch: 流萤的愿望呢？
t_en: What about Firefly's wish?

t_ch: 你正注视着它。
t_en: You're looking right at it.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她是行于「终末」的猎手，为了反抗命运，注定舍弃自己的愿望。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She is a hunter who treads upon the Finality, destined to sacrifice her own wishes to defy destiny.</color>

t_ch: 但…无论你和她行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局，与最后的重逢。
t_en: But no matter which path you and she walk... {RUBY_B#Nihility}Death{RUBY_E#} will always be the destined finale and the last reunion.

t_ch: 准备好了吗？不久前，她也曾来到过这里…借此，你可以见证她的「决意」。
t_en: Are you ready? She, too, was here not long ago... You can witness her "resolve" through this.

t_ch: 见证那一点萤火，如何挣脱「虚无」的引力。
t_en: ...Witness how that tiny spark of bug light broke free from the pull of the Nihility.

t_ch: 过去，你是什么人？
t_en: Who were you in the past?

t_ch: 这里的景象…我…死去了吗？真正地……
t_en: This scenery... am I... dead? Really... dead...?

t_ch: 还差一线，迈过此处，你可以真正拥抱死亡。或者，你也可以就此回头。
t_en: Death is one step away from here. Step over this place, and you will truly embrace death. Or... you can turn back.

t_ch: 告诉我，过去，{RUBY_B#我}你{RUBY_E#}是什么人？
t_en: Tell me, {RUBY_B#who am I}who were you{RUBY_E#} in the past?

t_ch: 格拉默铁骑。
t_en: Glamoth's Iron Cavalry.

t_ch: 现在呢？
t_en: And who are you now?

t_ch: 星核猎手。
t_en: A Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 那么往后，你要成为谁？
t_en: Then, who will you become in the future?

t_ch: …一个平凡的女孩子。
t_en: ...Just an ordinary girl.

t_ch: 那么，继续向前走吧，死去对你来说更加合适。
t_en: Well then, keep walking forward. Death would suit you better.

t_ch: 绝不，我拼尽全力走到了今天，而这一切，还没有结束。即使一切烧绝烬尽，我也不会放弃！
t_en: Never. I've fought tooth and nail to get where I am today, and this isn't over yet. Even if everything burns to ashes, I won't give up!

t_ch: 你应该知道，那是不可能实现的愿望。
t_en: You should know that's a wish that can never come true.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>即使在「最后的美梦」中，你也没能成为普通的少女。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You couldn't become an ordinary girl even in "The Last Sweet Dream."</color>

t_ch: …为什么这样认为？
t_en: ...Why do you think that?

t_ch: 涉入家族的阴谋，直面迷因的锋刃，携着能窥视未来的「剧本」，独自一人，挑战复生的寰宇蝗灾。
t_en: Entangled in The Family's conspiracy, facing the memetic entities' blades head-on, while challenging the resurrected Swarm Disaster alone, armed only with the "script" that can peer into the future...

t_ch: 你要的证据数不胜数。
t_en: That's more than enough cards stacked against you.

t_ch: 难道你认为，和{NICKNAME}度过的时光，足以说明什么吗？
t_en: Do you really think that the time you spent with {NICKNAME} proved anything?

t_ch: 对于一个普通的少女，平凡的幸福不该仅仅是偶然。
t_en: For an ordinary girl, simple happiness shouldn't just be a matter of chance.

t_ch: 可谁说…<color=#dbc291ff>这一切，不是一个普通少女的作为？</color>
t_en: But who's to say... <color=#dbc291ff>all of this isn't what an ordinary girl would do?</color>

t_ch: …什么？
t_en: ...What?

t_ch: 梦主或许没有说错，<color=#dbc291ff>所有我们抛在身后的过去，早已决定了我们的未来</color>。
t_en: Perhaps the Dreammaster was right. <color=#dbc291ff>All the past we've left behind has already determined our future</color>.

t_ch: 我至今为止的经历，以后，还是会让我在面对危险时，选择踏入其中。
t_en: All my experiences so far will still make me choose to step into danger when I face it in the future.

t_ch: 但你误会了我的话。
t_en: But you misunderstood my answer.

t_ch: 倒也怪我，总是说着什么，想过普通的生活…好像塑造了我的过去，对我来说是沉重的负担一样。
t_en: I guess it's my fault too, always talking about wanting a normal life... As if the past that shaped me is some heavy burden weighing me down.

t_ch: 无论格拉默铁骑的身份，还是失熵症…都不仅仅是伤痕而已。正是这样的过去…<color=#dbc291ff>教会我珍惜，催促我找寻，让我懂得，如何去爱</color>。
t_en: Being a Glamoth's Iron Cavalry and having Entropy Loss Syndrome are more than just scars... <color=#dbc291ff>They are a past that taught me to cherish, urged me to seek, and showed me how to love</color>.

t_ch: 你刚才所说的一切，的确很不同寻常啦，但我相信……
t_en: All the things you listed are quite extraordinary indeed, but I believe...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>任何一个平凡的少女，面对我所面对的这一切，也会做出一样的选择。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Any ordinary girl would make the same choice I did... When faced with everything I have faced.</color>

t_ch: 在面对黑暗的时刻，平凡人从来不需要感到卑微——毕竟，他们总是发现，自己早已是如此崇高与光明。
t_en: In the darkest moments, ordinary people never need to feel small. After all, they always discover that they've already become something noble and bright.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是啊，我改变不了结果，甚至也改变不了过程……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Indeed. I can't change the outcome or even the process...</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但我可以决定，应该如何看待我的命运。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>But I can decide how to view my destiny.</color>

t_ch: 比起能够改变结果，这只是程度更深的自欺欺人。
t_en: This is just an even deeper form of self-deception compared to actually changing the outcome.

t_ch: 对大多数人来说，自由意志原本就是自欺欺人。但只要我没有要求别人这样做，我就不会为此感到羞愧。
t_en: Free will is mere self-deception for most people anyway. But as long as I'm not asking others to do the same, there's no shame in it for me.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡，每个人都拥有不同的答案。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Everyone has their own answer as to why life slumbers.</color>

t_ch: 可有些人永远无法找到。
t_en: Some will never find their answer.

t_ch: 但也没有任何人，可以剥夺他们继续寻找的机会。
t_en: But no one can take away their chance to keep looking for the answer.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我仍然不会放弃，也不会指责放弃的人——我要做的，只是把选择的权利，重新交给他们，也重新交给自己。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I won't give up, nor will I blame those who do. All I need to do is return their right to make that choice... and return that right to myself as well.</color>

t_ch: 所以，我会离开这里，和你一起。
t_en: So, I will leave this place, together with you.

t_ch: 即使拥抱曾经的力量，会让我更快死去。
t_en: ...Even if embracing my former strength means speeding towards my death.

t_ch: 我赋予自己的名字，是「流萤」。以前我还以为，是我觉得自己和萤火虫很像，只是转瞬即逝的微光……
t_en: The name I gave myself is "Firefly." I used to think I was similar to a firefly, just a fleeting glimmer of light...

t_ch: 可后来我才发现，哪有人会给自己起一个不吉利的名字呀？
t_en: But later, I realized no one would give themselves an unlucky name.

t_ch: 其实，原因是我觉得萤火虫很美。后来有人告诉我，那只是因为我的眼睛机能不够，否则就会发现，它们其实一点也不漂亮。
t_en: It was also because I thought fireflies were beautiful. Later, someone told me that my eyes don't actually work very well. Otherwise, I would have figured out that those insects aren't beautiful at all.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>美也好，爱也好，我们的所有感受，来源都是我们生来的「缺陷」，而每个人都因此与众不同。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Beauty... Love... All our feelings stem from the "flaws" we were born with, and that's what makes each of us unique.</color>

t_ch: 可是，我仍然会去喜欢类似的小东西。
t_en: Yet I can't help but love these little things.

t_ch: 就算我很怕冷，总是受不了夜风，我也还是会去看星星。
t_en: Even though I'm sensitive to cold and can't stand the night wind, I still go stargazing.

t_ch: 就算做蛋糕真的很麻烦，我也还是会去尝试，因为我喜欢把它送给重要的人们，看着他们微笑。
t_en: Even though baking cakes is really troublesome, I'll still keep trying, because I love giving them to people who matter to me and seeing those people smile.

t_ch: 我喜欢去到处找可爱的裙子，不是为了向别人展示，是因为那会让我自己的心情很好。
t_en: I love going around looking for cute dresses, not to show off to others, but because it makes me feel good.

t_ch: 所以，我不会再介意任何缺陷，不怕再添任何伤痕，我会拼尽全力，找到所爱之物，不让它们被命运夺走。所以……
t_en: So, I won't mind any flaws anymore. I won't fear any new scars. I'll give it my all to find what I love, and I won't let destiny take them away. So...

t_ch: 飞蛾扑火，不是渴望光芒。
t_en: Moths don't fly to flames because they yearn for light.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>是要穿过火焰，点燃自己，发出最热烈的光。</color>我的命运不会坠入黑暗，我会自己……
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It's about going through the flames, igniting yourself, and burning with the most intense light.</color> My destiny won't fall into darkness. I will...

t_ch: …照亮身边的所有！
t_en: ...light up everything around me!

t_ch: 只要钟表还在转动，死若有时——
t_en: As long as the clock keeps ticking, death comes for us all eventually...

t_ch: ——生亦有时。
t_en: ...and life has its time, too.

t_ch: 我的世界总是会被烧成一片焦土啊，那就烧吧。
t_en: If my world always ends up being burned to ashes... Then let it burn.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要我能一直燃烧下去，我所在的地方，就是「烈火」，而非「灰烬」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>As long as I can keep burning, then wherever I am will be "Flames," not "Ashes."</color>

t_ch: 指令：撕碎。
t_en: Order: Dismember.

t_ch: 其实，我曾经很羡慕你。即便生为一场灾难，内心也不会因此感到痛苦。
t_en: Actually, I used to envy you. You wouldn't feel pain even though you were born to bring disaster.

t_ch: 但现在…你应该向往我。
t_en: But you should be envious of me now.

t_ch: 我不愿面对死亡，也不想再继续战斗。但在命运面前……
t_en: I'm unwilling to face death, nor do I want to keep fighting. But when faced with destiny...

t_ch: 我永远不会逃走。
t_en: I will never run away.

t_ch: 活着…就是想象未来的自己，可命运从未公平。
t_en: To live... Is to imagine a future version of yourself, but fate is never fair.

t_ch: 人们此刻的选择，几乎完全由自己的过去所决定。但无论现在怎样奋力前行，也未必能迎来想象中的明天。
t_en: The choices people make are almost completely dictated by their past. No matter how much they try to move forward, there's no guarantee they'll see the future they've imagined.

t_ch: 就像所有命途一样，<color=#dbc291ff>无论你是否承认，「虚无」都已「存在」，而一切存在，也都无法彻底摆脱虚无。</color>
t_en: It's the same for every Path. <color=#dbc291ff>The Nihility already "exists" whether you admit it or not, and nothing can ever completely escape from nihility.</color>

t_ch: 大多命途会使人认为，这世界是美好的——只要你愿意「相信」，就能因相信本身得到力量。
t_en: Most Paths make people believe that this world is good. That as long as you are willing to "believe," you would gain power because of your belief.

t_ch: 「虚无」并非如此，它荒谬而广大，捕获那些不愿盲信，却又无力与其抗争的人。
t_en: But that does not apply to the Nihility. The Nihility is absurd and vast, capturing those who were unwilling to blindly believe yet are powerless to fight back.

t_ch: 它与美好断然无关…相信也好，盲信也罢，人们从「信念」中获得力量，应当发自内心，而不是被迫低头。
t_en: It has nothing to do with good... Be it willing or blind, the way people obtain strength from "faith" should come from within, not from being forced to bow their heads.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这将是艰苦的一程，你还是愿意再次，再次走上起点吗？
t_en: This will be a tough journey, {NICKNAME}. Are you still willing to return to the starting point once again?

t_ch: 我永远会相信明天。
t_en: I will always believe in tomorrow.

t_ch: 我会继续抗争下去。
t_en: I will keep fighting.

t_ch: 我会结束这个长夜。
t_en: I will end this long night.

t_ch: 让所有人得到证明。
t_en: Everyone will be vindicated.

t_ch: 如此，你们一定能在阳光下相聚。
t_en: In this way, you will reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.

t_ch: 愿死亡仍未结束她的「最后一梦」。
t_en: May death yet end her "Last Dream."

t_ch: 愿你能引领人们，{RUBY_B#开拓}归还{RUBY_E#}清醒的{RUBY_B#明天}世界{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: May you guide people {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}back{RUBY_E#} to the waking {RUBY_B#tomorrow}world{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 这边，亲爱的。
t_en: This way, darling.

t_ch: 各位，跟我来吧。
t_en: Alright, please come with me.

t_ch: 冷静点……
t_en: Stay calm...

t_ch: 只愿除了记忆…人们还能拥有彼此。
t_en: If only people could have each other beyond just memories.

t_ch: 我想要这世界上的一切，又或者，找到唯一能取悦我的存在。
t_en: I want everything this world has to offer, or perhaps I want to find the one existence that can truly please me.

t_ch: 但愿死去后，能再见到她。她会因此知道，我也只是人而已…而人最终都能幸福。
t_en: I hope that I'll see her again after I die. Then she'll know that I, too, am only human... And all humans will find happiness in the end.

t_ch: 希望所有人总能和家人团聚，有炖菜吃，一直大笑。
t_en: I hope everyone can always reunite with their family, enjoy home-cooked stew, and keep on laughing.

t_ch: 终有一日，活着的人都能知道：该如何思考，才能自己创造幸福。
t_en: One day, those who live will all come to understand how they need to think to create their own happiness.

t_ch: 愿人们彼此拥抱，无论与谁相逢，都愿意献上最真诚的赞美！
t_en: May people embrace each other, and offer their most sincere compliments to whoever they meet!

t_ch: 我们的愿望，就交到你手里了。请让它们迎来，今后每一天的日出。
t_en: Our hopes and dreams are in your hands now. Please guide them to witness every sunrise that is yet to come.

t_ch: 如果你就是梦主的答案，那么，就请你代替他，倾听我的回答——
t_en: If you are the Dreammaster's answer, then listen to my reply in his stead...

t_ch: 人们怀抱希望，不是因为未曾直面注定的死亡。
t_en: People hold onto hope not because they have never faced inevitable death.

t_ch: 正因我们注定死去，才会怀抱「想要改变」的希望。
t_en: It's precisely because we're destined to die that we hold onto the hope of "wanting to change something."

t_ch: 此处再无神明，造就乐园的，乃是「人之君王」！
t_en: No more gods will ever stand here again. This paradise shall be forged by the "King of Humankind"!

t_ch: 他正在创造一条前所未见的命途……
t_en: He's forging a Path that's never been observed before...

t_ch: 「秩序」终有瑕缺，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
t_en: The Order is ultimately flawed. By this decree, it shall be ended!

t_ch: 「记忆」须臾即灭，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
t_en: The Remembrance is fleeting and impermanent. By this decree, it shall be ended!

t_ch: 休想！拉扎莉娜献出生命，才守护了美梦的过去！
t_en: No way! Razalina gave her life to protect the sweet dream's past!

t_ch: 「巡猎」徒增苦厄，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
t_en: The Hunt brings only futile misery. By this decree, it shall be ended!

t_ch: 但铁尔南的子弹，仍在守护着美梦的今天。
t_en: But Tiernan's bullets still protect the sweet dream's present.

t_ch: 「虚无」寸光无余，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
t_en: The Nihility leaves no light unextinguished. By this decree, it shall be ended!

t_ch: 可钟表匠的意志，永远不会消磨殆尽。
t_en: But the will of the Watchmaker will never be worn away.
